channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: There's another sign that the Trump phone might actually be launching — though it's not clear when
item.description: The Trump Phone has actually passed through FCC clearance, which means it might be on the way.

item.title: The Best Pixel 10 Cases and Accessories (2026): We’ve Tested Dozens
item.description: Slap a case on your shiny new Pixel, whether you have the Pixel 10a, Pixel 10, or Pixel 10 Pro XL. We also have recommendations for Qi2 chargers and other accessories.

item.title: Your Vape Wants to Know How Old You Are
item.description: Companies hope that biometric age-verification tech in cartridges could put flavored vapes back in business. But it's unlikely to solve the real problems.

item.title: Oppo made the best foldable phone, again
item.description: There are always a few reasons people give for not buying a foldable phone. Some - price, battery life, camera quality - are mostly a matter of manufacturers balancing spec sheets to offset the added cost of the folding hardware. Others - durability, size - were practical design problems that have mostly been solved. But […]

item.title: I went to Spotify’s new Listening Lounge in London, and its bespoke audio setup is a reminder that stereo is forever — and I just know music fans are going to love it
item.description: Spotify's London HQ is the home of the company's first Listening Lounge, and I experienced it first-hand.

item.title: How to watch RCB vs Sunrisers Hyderabad: live stream the 2026 IPL opener from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch RCB vs Sunrisers Hyderabad live streams from anywhere, with Virat Kohli and Liam Livingstone in the spotlight for the IPL 2026 opener.

item.title: I’ve found the best Spring camera deals — including record-low prices on top models from Canon, Nikon, Sony, and more
item.description: B&H Photo and Adorama have awesome Spring deals this week, including prices that match those from Black Friday.

item.title: Beat-based dungeon crawlers, card-battling soccer sims and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. As ever, we've got some new games for you to dive into this weekend, and a glimpse at some upcoming titles. But, first, a look at indie studio Albatross Interactive's take on a multiplayer mode from a much-loved blockbuster. Terminal War is a 4v4 third-person shooter and it seems like the small team of developers is trying to keep things grounded. Ammo and supplies are scarce, and there's an emphasis on melee combat with the promise of "brutal executions." The action is set in the late '90s, a few years after a global wa...

item.title: J’ai testé la Garmin Instinct Crossover Amoled : une montre de sport, certes, mais une montre de sport à aiguilles
item.description: Dans le domaine des montres de sport, rares sont les modèles à profiter à la fois d'un suivi GPS et d'un design hybride, avec de véritables aiguilles physiques. C'est le cas de la Garmin Instinct Crossover Amoled dont voici le test complet.

item.title: The Best Samsung Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: From flagship and budget to flipping and folding, Samsung’s Galaxy range spans the breadth of the smartphone cosmos. WIRED’s here to help you make your choice.

item.title: This free web tool makes everything way easier to read
item.description: You’ve never seen the web so simple and clutter-free. It sure is nice to have the web look the way you want—without all the usual awkward font choices and other assorted distractions—isn’t it?

item.title: DJI aussi a son action cam POV : l’Osmo Nano, qui filme en 4K, est à prix cassé
item.description: Tout comme Insta360, DJI propose désormais une caméra d'action conçue pour la prise de vue à la première personne : l'Osmo Nano, qui filme en plus en 4K. AliExpress la propose en ce moment à 221,18 euros au lieu de 279 euros.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Mega Evolution Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box is down to market value at Amazon — buy for under $80
item.description: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Elite Trainer Box is available to buy for $79.99 at Amazon.

item.title: Tesla a breveté une remorque un peu particulière : comment elle pourrait booster l’autonomie de ses voitures électriques
item.description: Tesla a breveté un prolongateur d'autonomie sous la forme d'une remorque chargée de batteries. De quoi augmenter l'autonomie d'une voiture électrique, même si les chances d'arrivée sur le marché sont minces : la marque a déjà annulé un projet similaire sur son Cybertruck.

item.title: Should We Be Hyped—or Freaked Out—About Nuclear Microreactors?
item.description: Microreactors could be coming very soon to commercial grids. Is that a good thing? We asked the experts.

item.title: Samsung Frame Pro Review: A Good TV for a Pretty Living Room
item.description: This is the first truly impressive art TV I’ve seen.

item.title: How to watch Virat Kohli at IPL 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch Virat Kohli at IPL 2026, with a well-rested VK eyeing back-to-back Indian Premier League titles with Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

item.title: How to watch IPL 2026: live streams, fixture list for Indian Premier League cricket season
item.description: All the ways to watch IPL 2026 live streams online, with Royal Challengers Bengaluru entering the 19th Indian Premier League season as reigning champions.

item.title: I didn't think Something Very Bad is Going to Happen season 2 was possible — but Camila Morrone already has it all planned out
item.description: Something Very Bad is Going to Happen season 2 has not been confirmed by Netflix — but Camila Morrone is full of ideas for where to go next.

item.title: I tested the Tower Elite 11-Liter Flexi Drawer Air Fryer — it’s the best bang-for-buck large-capacity air fryer around
item.description: You’ll be hard-pressed to find a better value air fryer with a capacity that can match the Elite 11-Liter Flexi Drawer.

item.title: Should you trust AI to do your taxes?
item.description: We’re using AI to fix our grammar, streamline our to-do lists, or find recipes. Here’s what to keep in mind when using AI to help do your taxes. No language on earth has ever produced the expression “as enjoyable as filing your taxes.” This annual chore is the pits. It’s slow, frustrating work that requires organization, math skills, and the ability to decipher meaning from the U.S. tax code. People will jump on pretty much any solution that makes filing quicker, easier, and less painful–including giving AI a crack at it....

item.title: 99 housing markets where home prices are falling: See the map
item.description: Among the 300 largest housing markets, 99 are seeing year-over-year home prices fall, while 201 are seeing them rise. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Im a tech editor, and I found 40+ Amazon Big Spring Sale tech deals Id actually buy
item.description: I'm a tech editor, and I found the top tech deals from Amazon's Big Spring Sale. Grab Sony headphones for $48, Kindles for $94, and $250 off MacBooks.

item.title: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is under $50 at Amazon — buy for close to market value
item.description: The Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Booster Bundle is available to buy $49.95 at Amazon.
